approval.allowance.name: approval.allowance
approval.allowance.description: Inspect a token allowance: surfaces raw value, unlimited-allowance flag, and coverage of a requested amount.

allowance.description: Current allowance (uint256 string). Defaults to 0 when omitted.

requested_amount.description: Amount being requested by the transaction (uint256 string).

approval.cover_inputs.name: approval.cover_inputs
approval.cover_inputs.description: Whether the token allowance covers the requested input amount.

allowances_cover_inputs.description: Caller-supplied override; takes precedence when present.

requested_amount.description: Amount being requested by the transaction.

clock.now.name: clock.now
clock.now.description: Current Unix timestamp (seconds) from the daemon's clock.
clock.now.stateDependency: none (host wall clock, not wallet state)

oracle.effective_rate_bps.name: oracle.effective_rate_bps
oracle.effective_rate_bps.description: Effective rate of a swap vs the oracle's mid-market price, expressed in basis points (negative = unfavourable).
oracle.effective_rate_bps.stateDependency: external price feed (oracle mid-market); no wallet-state read

oracle.usd_value.name: oracle.usd_value
oracle.usd_value.description: Convert a token amount to its USD valuation via a price oracle.
oracle.usd_value.stateDependency: external price feed (coingecko/chainlink); under ADR-009 this resolves to the DIRECT read of token_holdings.price_value (LiveField) instead of a live oracle call

source.description: Which price source to query. `coingecko` is HTTP-based and works out of the box; `chainlink` reads on-chain feeds and needs POLICY_RPC_CHAIN_RPCS configured per chain.

portfolio.balance.name: portfolio.balance
portfolio.balance.description: Wallet balance of a specific token.

portfolio.input_fraction_bps.name: portfolio.input_fraction_bps
portfolio.input_fraction_bps.description: Fraction of the wallet's portfolio (denominated in the input asset) the transaction is spending, in basis points.

scopeball.evaluate_v3.name: scopeball.evaluate_v3
scopeball.evaluate_v3.description: Phase 5D mock — echo (envelopes, eval_context, wallet_id) back as policyRequest.actions with empty state_before / deltas / state_after. Real implementation arrives in Phase 6 (reducer + state sync).
scopeball.evaluate_v3.stateDependency: whole-wallet state (holdings/approvals/positions) folded through the reducer to produce State₂ (mock today; Phase 6 wires the real reducer)

wallet_id.description: WalletId (address + chains). Carried verbatim by the mock; Phase 6 will key state persistence off this.

envelopes.description: List of caller-built Action envelopes (typed PDF FSM ActionBody). The mock echoes these into policyRequest.actions.

stat_window.snapshot.name: stat_window.snapshot
stat_window.snapshot.description: Rolling-window snapshot of recent on-chain activity for the wallet.
stat_window.snapshot.stateDependency: cross-request activity history ([H]); not in the state DB today (only state_deltas is partial)

stat_window.swap_stats.name: stat_window.swap_stats
stat_window.swap_stats.description: Per-action stats over a sliding 24h window (volume + count).
stat_window.swap_stats.stateDependency: cross-request swap history over a 24h window ([H]); not in the state DB today

approval.unlimited_over_balance.name: approval.unlimited_over_balance
approval.unlimited_over_balance._structural_flag: REAL/implemented in crates/simulation/server/src/facts.rs (sim-server fact host), NOT the policy-rpc daemon. It sits in `planned` only because `methods` is byte-coupled to the daemon (catalog.test.ts drift test). Under ADR-009 (policy-rpc retiring, sim-server = fact host) the structural home for sim-server methods is an open question — see catalog_conformance.rs Task-5 flag.
approval.unlimited_over_balance.description: GEN-01: is the ERC20 approval to `spender` on `token` unlimited, and how many times the wallet's available balance does the approved amount cover? Emits TWO context fields from one call.

external.address_blocklisted.name: external.address_blocklisted
external.address_blocklisted.description: GEN-11: is `address` on an external reputation blocklist? Read from an external reputation feed, not the wallet-state DB.

valuation.asset_usd.name: valuation.asset_usd
valuation.asset_usd.description: USD valuation of a single asset position: token amount × DB price. Replaces the live oracle.usd_value call with a DIRECT read of the refrigerated LiveField (ADR-009).

position.health_factor_after.name: position.health_factor_after
position.health_factor_after.description: Health factor of a lending position AFTER virtually applying the proposed borrow/withdraw (State₂). Reducer recomputes from refrigerated collaterals/debts/liquidation_threshold + price. Drives AAVE-01 (T3).

action.description: The proposed borrow/withdraw — applied via the reducer to produce State₂ before recomputing HF. Without it the method cannot compute the AFTER value.

perp.notional_to_collateral.name: perp.notional_to_collateral
perp.notional_to_collateral.description: Ratio of the proposed order's notional (size × markPrice) to the account's total collateral USD. SELF-VERIFY: on OpenPosition both inputs live in the action's live_inputs (size, markPrice, userAccountState.totalCollateralUsd) → this is a DERIVED read, not a whole-wallet fold. A cross-position collateral fold is a separate variant. Drives PERP-03.

action.description: The proposed perp order: size × markPrice = notional; userAccountState = collateral denominator.

portfolio.group_pct.name: portfolio.group_pct
portfolio.group_pct.description: Whole-wallet fold: percentage of total portfolio USD held in a token/category group AFTER the proposed action (State₂). PortfolioAggregate — gated on ADR-010 (T2). Output flattens per-group scalars into context fields.

group_axis.description: How holdings are grouped to form the share's denominator/numerator.

asset.description: The group key being measured (e.g. the acquired token for group_axis=token).

basis.description: state1 = current holdings; state2 = after the action is applied via the reducer.

valuation.tx_total_usd.name: valuation.tx_total_usd
valuation.tx_total_usd.description: Total USD outflow of the whole transaction (incl. multicall children): sum of net negative balance deltas × price_value. State₂ via reducer. Drives GEN-05.

action.description: Tx/multicall applied via reducer to sum net outflow.

valuation.gas_cost_usd.name: valuation.gas_cost_usd
valuation.gas_cost_usd.description: Gas cost in USD = gasEstimate (action field) × native token price_value. Drives GEN-07/08.

approval.set_for_all_state.name: approval.set_for_all_state
approval.set_for_all_state.description: Whether (collection, operator) already holds a set-for-all grant in wallet state. Boost for GEN-02 (the core allowlist check is a Cedar set literal).

perp.position_state.name: perp.position_state
perp.position_state.description: EXISTING perp position's side / effective leverage / unrealized-pnl % from wallet state (NOT carried in the action's live_inputs). Drives PERP-08 (crosses zero), PERP-09 (adding to a loser), PERP-11 (leverage up).

market.description: Perp market identifying the existing position.

perp.liq_distance_bp.name: perp.liq_distance_bp
perp.liq_distance_bp.description: Distance (bp) from the liquidation price to the mark price AFTER opening the position (State₂). Reducer computes the resulting liq_price. Drives PERP-02.

claim.source_held_state.name: claim.source_held_state
claim.source_held_state.description: Whether the airdrop claim's source contract matches a known-eligible claim in wallet state, and whether the claimed token is ALREADY held (gasless-permit-on-held-token scam). Drives AIR-02/03.

action.description: Claim action: source contract + claimed token.

launchpad.sale_match.name: launchpad.sale_match
launchpad.sale_match.description: Whether the claim/commit target matches the original sale contract recorded in wallet state (LaunchpadAllocation.sale_id). Drives LP-01.

token.peg_ratio.name: token.peg_ratio
token.peg_ratio.description: Ratio of an LST/stable token's market price_value to its declared peg (TokenKind.peg_to). < 1 signals depeg. Drives STK-01, UNI-13.

position.health_factor_with_volatility.name: position.health_factor_with_volatility
position.health_factor_with_volatility.description: AAVE-02: post-trade health factor (State₂, same reducer recompute as position.health_factor_after) PLUS the collateral-volatility class of the position's dominant collateral. Emits TWO context fields from one call so a single policy can gate on 'HF in the warn band AND collateral is volatile'. The volatility class is an ExternalInfo tag (stable/volatile) joined onto the refrigerated collateral set.

action.description: The proposed borrow/withdraw — applied via the reducer to produce State₂ before recomputing HF.

position.ltv_after.name: position.ltv_after
position.ltv_after.description: AAVE-06: loan-to-value of a lending position AFTER virtually applying the proposed action (State₂), expressed as a decimal ratio (debt_usd / collateral_usd). Reducer recompute_ltv from refrigerated collaterals/debts + price. For eMode-entry policies this is the effective leverage the new category LTV cap is checked against; the policy reads the category cap from the action's base context (categoryConfig.ltvBp).

action.description: The proposed eMode/borrow action — applied via the reducer to produce State₂ before recomputing LTV.

position.borrow_fraction_bps.name: position.borrow_fraction_bps
position.borrow_fraction_bps.description: AAVE-07: fraction (basis points) of the user's remaining borrow capacity this borrow consumes = borrow_usd / availableBorrowUsd. The base Borrow context carries availableBorrowUsd only as a U256 hex string and amountUsd only as an optional decimal, so the ratio cannot be formed by a pure Cedar action-field read — it needs a derived read that prices the borrow amount and divides by the precomputed UserLendingState.available_borrow_usd.

action.description: The proposed borrow: amount × price = numerator; userStateBefore.availableBorrowUsd = denominator.

reserve.is_siloed.name: reserve.is_siloed
reserve.is_siloed.description: AAVE-10: whether the borrow target reserve is configured as siloed (single-asset borrowing). The shipped ReserveState in the lending action context carries utilization / caps / frozen / paused flags but NOT the siloed flag, so this reserve-metadata bit must come from a dedicated read of the reserve config (reserve_state metadata), not a pure action-field.
stateDependency: positions(lending) reserve config (siloed flag); reserve metadata not surfaced as a base context field

reserve.isolation_debt_headroom_bps.name: reserve.isolation_debt_headroom_bps
reserve.isolation_debt_headroom_bps.description: AAVE-11: how close (basis points of the debt ceiling) the isolation-mode total debt would be AFTER this borrow = (isolationModeTotalDebt + borrow_usd) / debtCeiling. The debt ceiling and the protocol-global isolationModeTotalDebt are NOT base context fields — they are reserve/protocol-global metadata — so this proximity must be derived from those externals plus the proposed borrow.

venue.description: Lending venue identifying the isolated reserve.

action.description: The proposed borrow whose USD value is added to isolationModeTotalDebt.

reserve.cap_used_bp.name: reserve.cap_used_bp
reserve.cap_used_bp.description: AAVE-12: how full the reserve's supply/borrow cap would be AFTER this action, in basis points = (total + action.amount) / cap. ReserveState surfaces totalSupply/totalBorrow/supplyCap/borrowCap only as U256 hex strings (optional caps), which Cedar cannot compare numerically, so the used-bp ratio must be derived rather than read as an action-field. `cap_kind` selects supply vs borrow.

cap_kind.description: Which cap to measure against (supply for supply actions, borrow for borrow actions).

action.description: The proposed supply/borrow whose amount is added to the current total.

external.lst_price_divergence_bps.name: external.lst_price_divergence_bps
external.lst_price_divergence_bps.description: AAVE-09: divergence (basis points) between the Aave oracle's price for an LST/LRT collateral and its true market/backing price, read from an external feed. Pairs with token.peg_ratio (depeg) and the action's eMode category to gate high-LTV LST looping. External — not a wallet-state read.
external.lst_price_divergence_bps.stateDependency: external LST oracle-vs-market divergence feed (not state DB)

asset.description: The LST/LRT collateral asset whose oracle/market divergence is measured.

external.repay_swap_slippage_bps.name: external.repay_swap_slippage_bps
external.repay_swap_slippage_bps.description: AAVE-13: realized slippage (basis points, negative = unfavourable) of the embedded swap in a repay-with-collateral / collateral-swap, comparing the calldata's minAmountOut floor against the oracle fair price. The Repay action context carries no swap-floor field, so the floor and the fair price are both read externally (oracle mid-market + decoded calldata).
external.repay_swap_slippage_bps.stateDependency: external oracle mid-market price + decoded repay-with-collateral swap floor (not state DB)

action.description: The repay-with-collateral action whose embedded swap floor is compared to fair value.

external.oracle_freshness.name: external.oracle_freshness
external.oracle_freshness.description: AAVE-14: freshness of the borrow asset's price oracle — whether it is stale (ttl/confidence exceeded or L2 sequencer grace) and its age in seconds. Derived from the price LiveField's synced_at/ttl plus the L2 sequencer-uptime sentinel; surfaced as an external freshness signal rather than a base context field.
external.oracle_freshness.stateDependency: price LiveField synced_at/ttl/confidence + L2 sequencer-uptime sentinel (external freshness signal)
